name: Dirty Wastelander
description: Extremely potent alcoholic beverage. Alcoholic, re-roll up to 2 d20 on STR tests.

name: Purified Water
description: Heals 3 HP. Clean water with no radiation. The most essential survival resource.

name: Melon Juice
description: Heals 3 HP. Refreshing, promotes natural healing.

name: Mutfruit Juice
description: Heals 3 HP. Sharp and invigorating, wakes up the mind.

name: Tarberry Juice
description: Heals 3 HP. Immediately gain +6 AP.

name: Tato Juice
description: Heals 3 HP. Group AP pool can hold 1 more AP than normal.

name: Baked Bloatfly
description: Heals 6 HP. +2 Radiation DR. Unappetizing but helps absorb radiation.

name: Bloodbug Steak
description: Heals 10 HP. Max HP +3 until end of following scene.

name: Cooked Softshell Meat
description: Heals 9 HP. Gain +1 AP at start of next scene.

name: Crispy Squirrel Bits
description: Heals 6 HP. Simple roasted squirrel bits, no special effects.

name: Deathclaw Omelette
description: Heals 11 HP. If next scene is combat, regain 1 HP at start of each turn.

name: Deathclaw Steak
description: Heals 14 HP. Re-roll 1d20 on all STR tests until end of next scene.

name: Grilled Radroach
description: Heals 5 HP. Simple grilled radroach, no special effects.

name: Grilled Radstag
description: Heals 11 HP. Carry weight increases by +25 until end of next scene.

name: Iguana on a Stick
description: Heals 6 HP. Classic wasteland street food.

name: Iguana Soup
description: Heals 10 HP. Hearty iguana soup with vegetables.

name: Mirelurk Cake
description: Heals 12 HP. Can breathe underwater until end of next scene. Rare delicacy.

name: Mirelurk Egg Omelette
description: Heals 7 HP. Immediately add 2 AP to the group pool.

name: Mirelurk Queen Steak
description: Heals 14 HP. Reduce difficulty of all END tests by 1 until end of next scene.

name: Mole Rat Chunks
description: Heals 7 HP. +1 Maximum AP in group pool until end of current scene.

name: Mutant Hound Chops
description: Heals 8 HP. Heals 2 Radiation damage.

name: Mutt Chops
description: Heals 6 HP. Simple mutt chops, no special effects.

name: Noodle Cup
description: Heals 6 HP. Pre-War instant noodles, surprisingly rare.

name: Radscorpion Egg Omelette
description: Heals 9 HP. Cures all addictions.

name: Radscorpion Steak
description: Heals 12 HP. +2 Energy DR until end of next scene.

name: Radstag Stew
description: Heals 12 HP. +3 Energy DR until end of next scene. Hearty stew.

name: Ribeye Steak
description: Heals 10 HP. Simple brahmin steak, no special effects.

name: Roasted Mirelurk Meat
description: Heals 8 HP. Gain +1 AP at start of next scene.

name: Squirrel on a Stick
description: Heals 7 HP. Simple roasted squirrel on a stick.

name: Stingwing Filet
description: Heals 11 HP. Re-roll 1d20 on all PER tests until end of next scene.

name: Vegetable Soup
description: Heals 7 HP. +2 Radiation DR until end of next scene. Nutritious vegetable soup.

name: Yao Guai Ribs
description: Heals 13 HP. +2 Physical DR until end of next scene.

name: Yao Guai Roast
description: Heals 14 HP. +2 DC to melee attacks until end of next scene. Rare and potent.
